MCQ: What is the main purpose of Supervised Learning in Machine Learning?
Choices: a: To find patterns in unlabeled data | b: To classify or predict new, unseen data | c: To learn through trial and error | d: To generate labels from data

MCQ: Which type of learning combines labeled data with a large amount of unlabeled data?
Choices: a: Self-Supervised Learning | b: Semi-Supervised Learning | c: Unsupervised Learning | d: Reinforcement Learning

MCQ: What does Unsupervised Learning primarily do?
Choices: a: Trains models on labeled data | b: Finds patterns or groups in unlabeled data | c: Learns through rewards and penalties | d: Generates its own labels
